# init(format:packetCapacity:maximumPacketSize:)

**Initializer**

Creates a buffer that contains audio data in a compressed state.

## Declaration

```swift
init(format: AVAudioFormat, packetCapacity: AVAudioPacketCount, maximumPacketSize: Int)
```

## Parameters

- **format**: The format of the audio the buffer contains.
- **packetCapacity**: The capacity of the buffer, in packets.
- **maximumPacketSize**: The maximum size in bytes of a packet in a compressed state.

## Return Value

A new [doc://com.apple.avfaudio/documentation/AVFAudio/AVAudioCompressedBuffer] instance.

## Discussion

You can obtain the maximum packet size from the [doc://com.apple.avfaudio/documentation/AVFAudio/AVAudioConverter/maximumOutputPacketSize] property of an [doc://com.apple.avfaudio/documentation/AVFAudio/AVAudioConverter] you configure for encoding this format.

The method raises an exception if the format is PCM.

## Creating an Audio Buffer

- **init(format:packetCapacity:)**: Creates a buffer that contains constant bytes per packet of audio data in a compressed state.
